feedback: Core functionality implemented but significant gaps in test coverage and code quality. New features like janitor cron job and systemd services are present but lack comprehensive testing. Code smells in jobs.py and dispatch/run.py indicate potential maintainability issues. Missing edge case handling in key components.
issues: No test coverage for new janitor cron job implementation
Code smells in core/janitor/jobs.py (544L) and core/dispatch/run.py (675L)
Missing edge case handling in get_usage_stats() and get_config_sha()
No documentation for new systemd service configuration
Partial test coverage in ci.sh scripts

feedback: The work appears to focus on implementing janitor functionality with proper deployment setup (systemd service, cron job). However, there are test gaps in several modified files and code smells that suggest important aspects like edge case handling and comprehensive testing are missing.
issues: Test gaps in core/janitor/__init__.py, core/janitor/jobs.py, core/janitor/recorder.py, core/janitor/worker.py, core/search/argus_client.py, and scripts/tasks.py
Code smells in core/janitor/jobs.py and core/dispatch/run.py (long functions)
No visible test coverage for new code
Without code diff, cannot verify implementation matches intended functionality
